data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems
data.description: Systems in place to detect unauthorized access and malwares.
data.technical_spec: Network-based IDS with AI capabilities for real-time analysis.

data.title: End-to-end Encryption
data.description: Encryption for data security during transmission.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 for all user data exchanges.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Scheduled audits to identify and address vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Use of both manual and automated security assessment tools.

data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Proactive measures against sophisticated cybersecurity threats.
data.technical_spec: Integration of AI-driven threat intelligence platforms.

data.title: Multi-factor Authentication
data.technical_spec: SMS, email, and authenticator app-based MFA for user accounts.
